requirements.summary: Build hero section with barbershop branding and scroll-to-booking CTA
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section spans full viewport width
Barbershop name and tagline are prominently displayed
'Book Now' button is visible and scrolls to the contact/booking section on click

file_operations.description: Create hero section component with full-width banner displaying 'Sharp Cuts Barbershop' name, bold tagline ('Where Style Meets Precision' or similar), and prominent 'Book Now' button. Use the generated image frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1400x700.png as background. Implement smooth scroll to contact section on button click using scrollIntoView.

requirements.summary: Create Services section displaying backend service data in card grid
acceptanceCriteria: Services are fetched from the backend and rendered in a responsive card grid
Each card shows service name, description, price, and duration
Section is accessible via page navigation

file_operations.description: Add React Query hook useServices that fetches services from backend using actor.getServices(). Return the array of Service objects with name, description, price, and durationMinutes fields.

Create Services section component that uses useServices hook to fetch and display all services in a responsive card grid (2-3 columns on desktop, 1 column mobile). Each service card displays name, description, formatted price (e.g., '$25'), and duration (e.g., '30 min'). Add section id 'services' for navigation anchor.

requirements.summary: Create Meet the Team section displaying staff from backend with avatars
acceptanceCriteria: Staff cards are rendered from backend data
Each card displays name, role, bio, and a placeholder avatar
Section is visually distinct and consistently styled

file_operations.description: Add React Query hook useStaff that fetches staff members from backend using actor.getStaff(). Return the array of StaffMember objects with name, role, bio, and photoUrl fields.

Create Meet the Team section component that uses useStaff hook to fetch and display staff members in a card layout (2-3 columns responsive). Each card displays staff member's name, role, bio, and avatar. Use the generated placeholder image frontend/public/assets/generated/staff-avatar-placeholder.dim_256x256.png for photoUrl if not provided by backend. Add section id 'team' for navigation anchor.

requirements.summary: Create Gallery section with responsive grid of barbershop images
acceptanceCriteria: Gallery displays at least 4 images in a responsive grid
Images are served from frontend/public/assets/generated
Layout adapts gracefully to different screen sizes

file_operations.description: Create Gallery section component displaying barbershop images in a responsive grid (2 columns mobile, 3-4 columns desktop). Use these exact generated images from workspace: frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-cut-1.dim_600x600.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-shave-2.dim_600x600.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-tools-3.dim_600x600.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-barber-4.dim_600x600.png. Add section id 'gallery' for navigation anchor.

requirements.summary: Create Contact & Hours section with backend info and appointment form
acceptanceCriteria: Business hours and contact info are displayed from backend data
Appointment form collects name, phone, preferred date/time, and service
Submitted appointments are persisted in the backend
User sees a confirmation message after successful submission

file_operations.description: Add React Query hooks: useContactInfo (fetches contact info via actor.getContactInfo()), useBusinessHours (fetches hours via actor.getBusinessHours()), and useSubmitAppointment mutation (calls actor.submitAppointmentRequest with name, phone, preferredDateTime, and service parameters).

Create Contact & Hours section component that displays contact info (address, phone, email) and business hours (Monday-Sunday) fetched from backend using useContactInfo and useBusinessHours hooks. Include an appointment request form with fields for name (text), phone (tel), preferred date/time (datetime-local), and service (select dropdown populated from services). On submit, call useSubmitAppointment mutation and show success/error message. Add section id 'contact' for navigation anchor and 'booking' class for scroll targeting.

requirements.summary: Build sticky navigation bar with smooth-scroll links and mobile hamburger menu
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar is sticky and visible on all pages
All section links use smooth scrolling
Mobile hamburger menu expands/collapses navigation links
Active section is visually highlighted in the nav

file_operations.description: Create sticky top navigation component with barbershop logo (use frontend/public/assets/generated/barber-logo.dim_256x256.png) and name. Include smooth-scroll nav links to sections: Home (hero), Services (#services), Team (#team), Gallery (#gallery), and Contact (#contact). Implement mobile hamburger menu that toggles navigation visibility on small screens. Add active section highlighting using intersection observer to detect visible section.

requirements.summary: Apply cohesive dark masculine barbershop theme across all sections
acceptanceCriteria: All sections use the defined dark charcoal/black + gold color palette
Typography is consistent with a bold, premium barbershop aesthetic
No inconsistent color or font deviations across sections
Theme feels premium and professional on both desktop and mobile

file_operations.description: Replace existing theme with barbershop-specific design system: deep charcoal/black backgrounds (--background: oklch(0.15 0 0)), warm gold accents (--accent: oklch(0.75 0.15 85)), off-white text (--foreground: oklch(0.95 0.01 85)). Define consistent typography using bold sans-serif or serif fonts for headings. Add subtle texture overlays and clean whitespace utilities. Remove any existing game/neon styling.

Update Tailwind config to support barbershop theme: configure custom colors matching the dark charcoal/gold palette, add premium typography settings (serif for headings, sans-serif for body), define consistent spacing scale, and configure container/breakpoint utilities for responsive layout.

requirements.summary: Wire all generated static assets throughout the site
acceptanceCriteria: All generated images are loaded from /assets/generated/
Images are used in their respective sections (hero, gallery, logo)
No broken image links

file_operations.description: Replace existing App component content with barbershop single-page layout: render Navigation component, then HeroSection, ServicesSection, TeamSection, GallerySection, and ContactSection in order. Remove all existing game-related components and state. Ensure all sections are rendered in a seamless scrollable layout.
Update HTML title to 'Sharp Cuts Barbershop' and meta description to describe the barbershop website. Ensure favicon references the logo if needed.
